## 🎯 UX & Accessibility Checklist
<!-- Please check all that apply to your changes. -->

### ♿ Accessibility
- [ ] **Semantic HTML**: Used correct elements (buttons for actions, links for navigation, etc.)
- [ ] **Keyboard Nav**: All interactive elements are reachable and usable via keyboard.
- [ ] **ARIA Labels**: Added descriptive labels for icon-only buttons or complex components.
- [ ] **Color Contrast**: Checked that text/UI elements meet WCAG contrast requirements.
- [ ] **Focus States**: Visible and clear focus indicators for all interactive elements.

### ✨ User Experience
- [ ] **Responsive**: Verified layout on mobile, tablet, and desktop.
- [ ] **Loading States**: Added feedback for asynchronous operations.
- [ ] **Error Handling**: Friendly and actionable error messages for failure states.
- [ ] **Visual Polish**: Spacing, alignment, and transitions are consistent.
